prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic scene of a man standing inside a futuristic glass skyscraper city floating above the clouds. The environment is built entirely from transparent glass architecture, with massive reflective towers, bridges, and layered sky platforms stretching into the horizon. Soft natural daylight fills the scene, creating elegant reflections and refractions across every surface. The man stands calmly near a glass railing, looking out over the endless floating city below him. His posture is relaxed yet powerful, wearing a modern minimal outfit with clean lines and neutral tones, blending perfectly with the futuristic environment. Style: ultra-detailed, cinematic lighting, minimal sci-fi aesthetic, high-end architectural visualization, shallow depth of field, 35mm film look, realistic skin texture, clean composition, futuristic luxury atmosphere.
